summary: Code review completed for heading-up mode fix. All code changes verified correct. UI testing limited due to app stuck on loading screen (Firebase auth state not completing in test environment). This is a GPS-dependent feature that cannot be fully tested in desktop preview - code review is the primary test as noted in agent context.

ui_bugs.issue: App stuck on 'READY.' loading screen - Firebase auth state change not completing in test environment
ui_bugs.note: This may be a test environment issue, not a production bug. Firebase auth onAuthStateChanged may not be firing.

action_items: Verify app loads correctly in production/real browser (loading screen issue may be test environment specific)
Test heading-up mode on mobile device with real GPS to confirm fix works
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: App.tsx Line 158-160 - notifyListeners() now called on EVERY position update, not gated by telemetryChanged flag. This ensures updateRotationAndPan runs continuously as user moves.

VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx Line 3449-3457 - Route-based heading fallback handles lastSimIdxRef = -1 by using first route segment (routeCoordsRef.current[0] to [1]). This fixes initial heading when navigation state tracker hasn't run yet.
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx Line 3459-3462 - Position-based heading fallback uses secondary 'if' check (not else-if), so it's reachable even when isDriving is true but route heading is unavailable.
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx Line 3471 - Smoothing factor increased from 0.15 to 0.35 for faster heading convergence, making heading-up mode more responsive.

VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx Line 307-325 - handleToggleNorthUp correctly uses lastSimIdxRef for route heading, with fallback to first segment when idx is -1, then position heading, then smoothed heading.
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx Line 3526-3527 - updateRotationAndPan subscribes to telemetry changes via telemetryContext.subscribe(), ensuring it runs when notifyListeners() is called.

success_rate.frontend: Code Review: 100% | UI Testing: Limited (loading screen issue)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Heading-up mode fix verified via code review. The fix addresses: (1) notifyListeners() now fires on every GPS position update, (2) route heading fallback handles lastSimIdx=-1 using first segment, (3) position heading fallback is not blocked by isDriving, (4) smoothing factor increased to 0.35. App URL: https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com. Note: App was stuck on loading screen during UI testing - may be test environment issue with Firebase auth. This is a GPS-dependent feature that requires real device testing to fully verify.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The heading-up bug had multiple root causes: (1) notifyListeners() only fired when speed/heading CHANGED, meaning at steady speed with null GPS heading, updateRotationAndPan never ran and the map stayed north-up. (2) Route heading fallback failed when lastSimIdxRef was -1 (initial value before navigation state tracker runs). (3) Position heading fallback was gated behind 'else if (!isDriving)' so it was unreachable when driving. (4) Smoothing factor 0.15 was too slow for responsive heading updates.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Always notify on position change, handle lastSimIdx=-1 with first segment, use secondary if for position heading, increase smoothing to 0.35
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Code review confirms all fixes are correctly implemented
